---
title: "3.3 - Parameters Grid Search"
output: html_document
---

# Cell 1: Setup and Data

```{r}
set.seed(435)
library(R.ROSETTA)

selected_positions <- read.csv("data/clean/selected_positions.csv")

cat("Data:", nrow(selected_positions), "rows x", ncol(selected_positions), "cols\n")
cat("Classes:", paste(names(table(selected_positions$class)), table(selected_positions$class), sep="=", collapse=", "), "\n")
```

```{r}
best_johnson_param <- list(
    Modulo = TRUE,
    BRT = TRUE,
    BRTprec = 0.6,
    Precompute = FALSE,
    Approximate = TRUE,
    Fraction = 0.99
)

cat("Final Model\n")
ros_final <- rosetta(selected_positions,
    reducer = "Johnson",
    JohnsonParam = best_johnson_param,
    reducerDiscernibility = "Object",
    discrete = TRUE,
    classifier = "StandardVoter",
    underSample = FALSE,
    roc = TRUE,
    clroc = levels(selected_positions$decision)[1])
```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
